warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Dress Code Penalty, Late Arrival Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The assigned subject matter is absent from the presentation.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The assigned subject is not integrated into the presentation in an understandable way.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The assigned subject is integrated into the presentation in an understandable way.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The assigned subject is integrated and thoroughly developed throughout the presentation.

criteria.name: Identify and execute a consistent theme

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: A central idea is not conveyed.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A central idea is present, but its application varies across the presentation.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A central idea is clearly established and maintained consistently throughout the presentation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Individual experiences are used to elaborate upon the core idea.

criteria.name: Include accurate and appropriate supporting information

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No corroborating details are offered, or the material used is unsuitable.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Only a single instance of corroborating detail is presented.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several instances of corroborating details are presented.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several instances of corroborating details are included to elaborate and improve the presentation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The subject matter is not presented at all.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The opening segment lacks clarity.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The opening segment is clearly delivered, and the subject matter is established right away.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The opening segment is clearly delivered, the subject matter is established right away, and there is a smooth shift into the main content of the presentation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presentation lacks a defined subject.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several subjects are introduced without apparent links between them.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Key subjects are identified, linked, and substantiated across the entire presentation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Seamless transitions are effectively used to reinforce the primary subject.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The presentation does not have a concluding section.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The concluding section is not clearly presented.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: An effective concluding section is presented.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The concluding section establishes a connection to the entirety of the presentation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No engagement with the audience occurs.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation is read directly from notes with minimal visual engagement with the audience.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Notes are consulted occasionally while maintaining appropriate visual engagement with the audience.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Notes are consulted occasionally, appropriate visual engagement with the audience is maintained, and suitable body language and hand gestures are employed.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified abilities are demonstrated.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified abilities (self-assurance, composed posture, engaging eye contact, or clear voice delivery) are demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified abilities (self-assurance, composed posture, engaging eye contact, or clear voice delivery) are demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All specified abilities are demonstrated, thereby enhancing the overall presentation.
